dialogue_text: They surely will never do for a long journey, Toto,
source_excerpt: "They surely will never do for a long journey, Toto," she said. And Toto looked up into her face with his little black eyes and wagged his tail to show he knew what she meant.

speaker.notes: No canonical speaker could be inferred from the source context.

dialogue_text: I wonder if they will fit me,
source_excerpt: "I wonder if they will fit me," she said to Toto. "They would be just the thing to take a long walk in, for they could not wear out."

source_excerpt: "Come along, Toto," she said. "We will go to the Emerald City and ask the Great Oz how to get back to Kansas again."
